G. Jenkins Of the Idaho mine at
Alamo. states that he has just closed
q contract with B. c. Riblet Of Spo-
kane for the erection Of a 9000-foot
tramway. work on which was to be
commenced at once. There are 20
men at work on the Idaho, and a
force has been started to renovate
the old concentration. with which the
new tramway would connect the
mine. =

]. w. Chism and his partner, Hen

Of the Hecla group at Poplar to Spo-
kane parties. The group IS close
to the Lucky Jack and shows much
free gold.


Eight men are working at the Alma
across the lake from Lardo. The AL
ma runs high in gold and copper and
Is worked by a Boston company.


A rich strike was made on the Eva
which is of more tnan ordinary i'm
portance, inasmuch as it proves the
mine to a depth Of 700 feet. The ore
assayed $1,000 in gold to the ton. The
stamp mill is practically finished.
